_comment: Wide FB exam covering all biweekly ask dates from 2025-03-02 through 2026-04-26 (every FB cycle that has questions on disk). Includes ~9000 questions across all 9 FB sources, ~8400 of which have known outcomes. Useful as a 'realistic typical FB' baseline against which to compare the narrower paper tranches A and B; see experiments/wasted_run_analysis.py for the per-source representativeness audit and nips26 §H.2.3 for the writeup.
